env.SERVICES: agent webui observability mcp-vault mcp-websearch mcp-idealista mcp-homeassistant mcp-library mcp-sandbox mcp-channel-signalr mcp-channel-telegram mcp-channel-servicebus qbittorrent jackett redis camoufox homeassistant

tasks.label: docker-debug-up
tasks.command: docker volume inspect jackbot_vsdbg > /dev/null 2>&1 || $DC run --rm vsdbg-install && $DC build base-sdk && $DC up -d --build $SERVICES && until docker exec agent ls /remote_debugger/vsdbg > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done
